info.name: Duffel Flight Booking Flow
info.description:
Full booking flow: Airport Search → Offer Request → List Offers → Select Offer → Passenger Details → Create Order → Confirmation.

Variables are auto-captured between requests via test scripts. Run them in order for a complete end-to-end booking.

All example responses are from live test-mode API calls documented in duffel-api-exploration.md.

request.description:
Triggered as the user types in the origin/destination field.

Display format: `LTN — London Luton Airport · London, GB`
Store on select: `{ iata_code, name, city_name, iata_country_code }`

query.description: MUST be false — return_offers=true sends up to 1638 offers inline

request.description:
Triggered when user clicks "Search flights".

Auto-captures: `offerRequestId`, `passengerId` (used in POST /air/orders).

⚠️ `passengerId` is one-time per search — cannot reuse across different searches.

response.name: 201 — one-way KUL→SIN (live test response)

request.description:
Round-trip: 2 slices. Same auto-capture as the one-way request.

Note: round-trip returns ~1638 offers — always use return_offers=false.

response.name: 201 — round-trip KUL↔SIN (live test response)

request.description: Multi-city: 3 or more slices. City codes (LON, NYC) and airport codes (LHR, JFK) both accepted.

exec: console.log('Auto-selected first offer:', firstOffer.id, firstOffer.total_amount, firstOffer.total_currency);

query.description: Cursor from meta.after for next page

request.description:
Filtering is client-side only — no server-side filter params.
Auto-captures first offer: offerId, offerTotalAmount, offerCurrency.

response.name: 200 — paginated offers (live test response)

request.description:
Triggered when user clicks a flight card.

Returns extra fields not in list: passenger_identity_documents_required, payment_requirements.
Refreshes offerTotalAmount and offerCurrency (authoritative values for POST /air/orders).

response.name: 200 — single offer detail (live test response)

item.name: ℹ️ F3 is form-only (no API call)

request.description:
F3 (Passenger Details) has no Duffel API call — it is a pure form screen.

Required fields that map to POST /air/orders:
- given_name
- family_name
- born_on (YYYY-MM-DD)
- title: mr | mrs | ms | miss | dr
- gender: m | f
- email
- phone_number (E.164: +60123456789)
- identity_documents → only if passenger_identity_documents_required === true

Number of form instances = passengerIds.length from Zustand.

⚠️ 3 exact-match constraints:
- selected_offers[0] = offerId (auto-captured)
- payments[0].currency = offerCurrency (auto-captured, exact string)
- payments[0].amount = offerTotalAmount (auto-captured, exact string — no rounding)
- passengers[0].id = passengerId from step 2 (not a new ID)

response.name: 200 — order confirmed (live test response)

request.description:
Triggered on confirmation page load — also supports deep-link / browser refresh.

Enables /confirmation/ord_xxx as a shareable URL.

response.name: 200 — order detail (live test response)

request.description:
Returns one seat map per flight segment.
Availability: available | occupied | unavailable

response.name: 200 — airports MY (live test response)

request.description:
Step 1 of 2-step cancellation. Creates a PENDING cancellation — does NOT refund yet.
Follow up with POST /air/order_cancellations/{id}/actions/confirm to execute the refund.
